Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

This section provides management’s discussion and analysis of our financial condition and results of operations. We discuss revenue trends, margins, operating expenses, and cash flows, including key drivers and known uncertainties.

Revenue increased due to higher demand and pricing improvements. Gross margin expanded primarily due to mix. Operating expenses grew due to headcount and R&D investments.
